checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: Cloudflare detected (passive — no active challenge)
CAPTCHA detected: recaptcha, captcha
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
No login form found at common paths

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt blocks all bots (Disallow: /)
No sitemap.xml found
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
No JSON-LD structured data found
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Moderate semantic HTML: 16 semantic elements vs 57 divs
Poor accessibility: only 154/206 interactive elements have labels
Forms are well-structured: 4/4 inputs have names
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Good server-side rendering — content available without JavaScript
Good heading hierarchy: 17 headings, well-structured
Good link accessibility: 160/160 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Unexpected status 403 for DELETE on main page

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~35,260 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 4% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 17 — moderately nested
CSS class attributes consume ~9,444 tokens (27% of page) — utility class bloat
Reading this page costs $0.04–$0.53 per load ($0.22–$2.64 for a 5-page session)

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation
All 7 images have alt attributes (2 descriptive, 5 decorative)
Found 1 skip link(s) — helps agents jump to main content
Found 3 live region(s) — agents can detect dynamic content changes
1 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
2 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 377ms
Moderate payload: 138KB
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Lean resources: 2 scripts, 1 styles, 7 images
Compression enabled: gzip
